meta.title: RN - Software Engineer - Curitiba, PR
meta.description: Software Engineer with 2 years of corporate experience, specialized in Java, Spring Boot, and high-performance systems.

about.label: ABOUT
about.main: I build scalable and robust backend solutions, turning complex requirements into efficient APIs with clean code and best practices.
about.secondary: I started with programming logic and OOP in technical school, worked at Sanepar supporting large-scale internal systems, developed RESTful APIs with Spring Boot and JPA/Hibernate, automated processes with Python, applied agile methodologies (Scrum), and keep learning.

work.card1_desc: Authentication, validation, and structured error handling. Layered architecture Controller → Service → Repository with test coverage > 80%.
work.card2_desc: Operational report processing via external APIs, reducing manual processing time by ~70% and eliminating input errors.
work.card3_desc: Operations optimization for 500+ internal users, ~30% reduction in ticket resolution time. Quality control and functional testing.
